title: Evangelion vs gundams
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion vs gundams Post by Final Messenger » Mon Aug 22, 2011 10:26 am A little while ago I introduced five of my friends to evangelion they all seemed to enjoy it. But after we finished watching the series one of my friends said that gundams were way better and all my friends agreed. I then stated that evangelions would always win. All my friends then said no way then I replied with *cough* A.T. field *cough*. Then they said just cut the cable and wait five minutes. Then one of my friends said that gundams had enough fire power to penetrate the A.T. field. To sum the rest of our conversation I lost. But I want to hear other opinions would the gundams win. I mean some gundams do have the fire power to break the field (I think) one example is the strike freedom. So let the discussion begin go evangelions!!!!!!!!! oh and here is some more prof as to why evangelions will win http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YANcvG8G9lA

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 22, 2011 11:05 am I really don't think we need to have this thread again.
